tasks.desc: Return tools Leonard swore he needed
Scrub regret out of this bench
Fix the flickering mess of a lamp
Iron up his “fashion experiment” and burn it
Carry out all of his junk
Don't get cut from all the broken pieces
Hide the wood before he “sculpts” again
Pop open the bold paint can
Glue memories back together. Or don’t
Wrap up the vase Winston can’t let go of
Clean up after Leonard. Emotionally, too
Replace the bulb Leonard never did
Deconstruct his favorite shelf and rake it away
Climb up to Leonard's secret stash
Bring light back into the room
Set aside his so-called studio tools
Chop the wood. Forget the past
Move the bench to the shed
Stack his symbolic materials into the trash
Fix the vase that broke during a fight
Keep your hands clean while you dig up the past
Rewrap the vase with emotional bubble wrap
Great, more of Leonard's decor to polish
Wipe away the tears and the windows
